message:
fix(engine): correct percentile off-by-one and prevent i128 overflow in squared_distance

Use nearest-rank ceil formula ((count * P - 1) / 100 via saturating_sub)
for p95/p99 percentile index calculation in benchmark_evidence_bundle,
fixing an off-by-one that yielded index 96 instead of 95 for 1..=100.

Replace diff * diff with diff.saturating_mul(diff) in
ManifoldCoordinate::squared_distance to prevent i128 overflow on
adversarial coordinate inputs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
